outputs.main.sas:
# Program: 14-3.01_primary_endpoint_analysis.R
# Purpose: Primary Endpoint Analysis - ANCOVA for ADAS-Cog Change from Baseline
# Input: ADADAS dataset
# Output: 14-3.01.rtf

library(haven)
library(dplyr)
library(rtables)
library(emmeans)
library(car)

# Read ADADAS dataset
adadas <- read_xpt("adam/adadas.xpt")

# Filter to Efficacy population and primary endpoint
adadas_eff <- adadas %>%
  filter(EFFFL == "Y", 
         PARAMCD == "ACTOT",
         ANL01FL == "Y")

# Apply LOCF imputation
adadas_locf <- adadas_eff %>%
  arrange(USUBJID, AVISITN) %>%
  group_by(USUBJID) %>%
  fill(AVAL, .direction = "down") %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(AVISITN == 24)  # Week 24 endpoint

# Calculate change from baseline
adadas_locf <- adadas_locf %>%
  mutate(CHG = AVAL - BASE)

# Create site group variable if not present
if(!"SITEGR1" %in% names(adadas_locf)) {
  adadas_locf <- adadas_locf %>%
    mutate(SITEGR1 = as.factor(substr(SITEID, 1, 2)))
}

# Ensure treatment is factor with correct order
adadas_locf <- adadas_locf %>%
  mutate(TRTP = factor(TRTP, 
                       levels = c("Placebo", "Xanomeline Low Dose", "Xanomeline High Dose")))

# ANCOVA model with Type III SS
ancova_model <- lm(CHG ~ BASE + SITEGR1 + TRTP, data = adadas_locf)

# Type III SS for treatment effect
type3_test <- Anova(ancova_model, type = "III")
treatment_pval <- type3_test["TRTP", "Pr(>F)"]

# LS Means and pairwise comparisons
emm <- emmeans(ancova_model, ~ TRTP)
lsmeans_summary <- summary(emm)
pairwise_comp <- pairs(emm, adjust = "none")
pairwise_summary <- summary(pairwise_comp)
confint_pairs <- confint(pairwise_comp, adjust = "none")

# Dose-response trend test (linear contrast)
trend_contrast <- contrast(emm, list(trend = c(-1, 0, 1)))
trend_test <- summary(trend_contrast)
trend_pval <- trend_test$p.value

# Extract results by treatment
results_list <- list()
for(trt in levels(adadas_locf$TRTP)) {
  trt_data <- adadas_locf %>% filter(TRTP == trt)
  
  n <- nrow(trt_data)
  mean_chg <- mean(trt_data$CHG, na.rm = TRUE)
  sd_chg <- sd(trt_data$CHG, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  lsmean_row <- lsmeans_summary %>% filter(TRTP == trt)
  lsmean <- lsmean_row$emmean
  se_lsmean <- lsmean_row$SE
  ci_lower <- lsmean_row$lower.CL
  ci_upper <- lsmean_row$upper.CL
  
  results_list[[trt]] <- list(
    n = n,
    mean = mean_chg,
    sd = sd_chg,
    lsmean = lsmean,
    se = se_lsmean,
    ci_lower = ci_lower,
    ci_upper = ci_upper
  )
}

# Pairwise comparison results
pw_results <- list()
for(i in 1:nrow(pairwise_summary)) {
  contrast_name <- as.character(pairwise_summary$contrast[i])
  pw_results[[contrast_name]] <- list(
    diff = pairwise_summary$estimate[i],
    se = pairwise_summary$SE[i],
    ci_lower = confint_pairs$lower.CL[i],
    ci_upper = confint_pairs$upper.CL[i],
    pval = pairwise_summary$p.value[i]
  )
}

# Build rtables table
tbl <- basic_table(
  title = "Table 14-3.01",
  subtitles = c("Primary Endpoint Analysis",
                "ANCOVA of Change from Baseline in ADAS-Cog (11) at Week 24 - LOCF",
                "Efficacy Population"),
  main_footer = c(
    "ANCOVA model includes treatment, pooled site group, and baseline ADAS-Cog as covariates.",
    "LOCF = Last Observation Carried Forward",
    "LS Mean = Least Squares Mean from ANCOVA model",
    "CI = Confidence Interval",
    sprintf("Overall treatment p-value (Type III SS): %.4f", treatment_pval),
    sprintf("Dose-response trend test p-value: %.4f", trend_pval)
  )
) %>%
  split_cols_by("TRTP") %>%
  analyze("CHG", function(x, ...) {
    in_rows(
      "n" = length(x),
      "Mean (SD)" = rcell(c(mean(x), sd(x)), format = "xx.xx (xx.xx)"),
      .formats = c(n = "xx")
    )
  })

# Manual table construction for better control
header_row <- c("", "Placebo", "Xanomeline Low Dose", "Xanomeline High Dose")

table_data <- data.frame(
  Statistic = c(
    "Number of Subjects",
    "Observed Mean (SD)",
    "LS Mean (SE)",
    "95% CI for LS Mean",
    "",
    "Pairwise Comparisons",
    "  Low Dose vs Placebo",
    "    Difference in LS Means (SE)",
    "    95% CI",
    "    p-value",
    "  High Dose vs Placebo",
    "    Difference in LS Means (SE)",
    "    95% CI",
    "    p-value",
    "  High Dose vs Low Dose",
    "    Difference in LS Means (SE)",
    "    95% CI",
    "    p-value",
    "",
    "Overall Treatment Effect (Type III)",
    "Dose-Response Trend Test"
  ),
  Placebo = c(
    sprintf("%d", results_list[["Placebo"]]$n),
    sprintf("%.2f (%.2f)", results_list[["Placebo"]]$mean, results_list[["Placebo"]]$sd),
    sprintf("%.2f (%.2f)", results_list[["Placebo"]]$lsmean, results_list[["Placebo"]]$se),
    sprintf("(%.2f, %.2f)", results_list[["Placebo"]]$ci_lower, results_list[["Placebo"]]$ci_upper),
    rep("", 17)
  ),
  Low = c(
    sprintf("%d", results_list[["Xanomeline Low Dose"]]$n),
    sprintf("%.2f (%.2f)", results_list[["Xanomeline Low Dose"]]$mean, results_list[["Xanomeline Low Dose"]]$sd),
    sprintf("%.2f (%.2f)", results_list[["Xanomeline Low Dose"]]$lsmean, results_list[["Xanomeline Low Dose"]]$se),
    sprintf("(%.2f, %.2f)", results_list[["Xanomeline Low Dose"]]$ci_lower, results_list[["Xanomeline Low Dose"]]$ci_upper),
    rep("", 17)
  ),
  High = c(
    sprintf("%d", results_list[["Xanomeline High Dose"]]$n),
    sprintf("%.2f (%.2f)", results_list[["Xanomeline High Dose"]]$mean, results_list[["Xanomeline High Dose"]]$sd),
    sprintf("%.2f (%.2f)", results_list[["Xanomeline High Dose"]]$lsmean, results_list[["Xanomeline High Dose"]]$se),
    sprintf("(%.2f, %.2f)", results_list[["Xanomeline High Dose"]]$ci_lower, results_list[["Xanomeline High Dose"]]$ci_upper),
    rep("", 17)
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Add pairwise comparison values
pw_low_plac <- pw_results[["Xanomeline Low Dose - Placebo"]]
pw_high_plac <- pw_results[["Xanomeline High Dose - Placebo"]]
pw_high_low <- pw_results[["Xanomeline High Dose - Xanomeline Low Dose"]]

table_data$Placebo[7:18] <- c("", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "")
table_data$Low[7] <- ""
table_data$Low[8] <- sprintf("%.2f (%.2f)", pw_low_plac$diff, pw_low_plac$se)
table_data$Low[9] <- sprintf("(%.2f, %.2f)", pw_low_plac$ci_lower, pw_low_plac$ci_upper)
table_data$Low[10] <- sprintf("%.4f", pw_low_plac$pval)
table_data$Low[11:18] <- ""

table_data$High[7] <- ""
table_data$High[8] <- ""
table_data$High[9] <- ""
table_data$High[10] <- ""
table_data$High[11] <- ""
table_data$High[12] <- sprintf("%.2f (%.2f)", pw_high_plac$diff, pw_high_plac$se)
table_data$High[13] <- sprintf("(%.2f, %.2f)", pw_high_plac$ci_lower, pw_high_plac$ci_upper)
table_data$High[14] <- sprintf("%.4f", pw_high_plac$pval)
table_data$High[15] <- ""
table_data$High[16] <- sprintf("%.2f (%.2f)", pw_high_low$diff, pw_high_low$se)
table_data$High[17] <- sprintf("(%.2f, %.2f)", pw_high_low$ci_lower, pw_high_low$ci_upper)
table_data$High[18] <- sprintf("%.4f", pw_high_low$pval)

table_data$Placebo[20] <- sprintf("p = %.4f", treatment_pval)
table_data$Placebo[21] <- sprintf("p = %.4f", trend_pval)

# Output to RTF
library(r2rtf)

table_data %>%
  rtf_title("Table 14-3.01",
            "Primary Endpoint Analysis",
            "ANCOVA of Change from Baseline in ADAS-Cog (11) at Week 24 - LOCF",
            "Efficacy Population") %>%
  rtf_colheader("| Placebo | Xanomeline Low Dose | Xanomeline High Dose",
                col_rel_width = c(3, 2, 2, 2)) %>%
  rtf_body(col_rel_width = c(3, 2, 2, 2),
           text_justification = c("l", "c", "c", "c")) %>%
  rtf_footnote("ANCOVA model includes treatment, pooled site group, and baseline ADAS-Cog as covariates.",
               "LOCF = Last Observation Carried Forward",
               "LS Mean = Least Squares Mean from ANCOVA model",
               "CI = Confidence Interval") %>%
  rtf_encode() %>%
  write_rtf("outputs/14-3.01.rtf")
